name: Papachinos
deal: Mafia Monday — half-price pizza and pasta every Monday from 10am. Not valid on public holidays.
howToClaim: Visit any Papachinos branch on a Monday from 10:00. The 50% discount applies automatically at the till — no voucher needed

name: Papachinos
deal: Teddy Tuesday — kids eat free when they bring the family
howToClaim: Visit any Papachinos with the family on a Tuesday. Kids meal is complimentary with a paying adult

name: Papachinos
deal: Cake and Cappuccino — a slice of cake with a cappuccino for R70, all day every day
howToClaim: Order the Cake and Cappuccino combo at any Papachinos branch

name: The Tasting Room
deal: Owner's Breakfast — 2 bacon rashers, 2 eggs, 2 slices of toast and grilled tomato for R35. All day weekdays; 10am–1pm weekends and public holidays.
howToClaim: Visit any Tasting Room branch and order the Owner's Breakfast. Check the menu PDF for full details.

name: The Tasting Room
deal: Limitless Mimosa — bottomless mimosas for R149pp, Monday to Friday
howToClaim: Visit any Tasting Room branch on a weekday and ask for the Limitless Mimosa promotion. See page 4 of the menu PDF for all promos.

name: The Tasting Room
deal: Burger Wednesday — buy one burger, get one free for R135, all day every Wednesday
howToClaim: Visit any Tasting Room branch on a Wednesday. The BOGO burger deal applies all day.

name: Ocean Basket
deal: Kids Eat Free Monday — one free kids meal per paying adult meal
howToClaim: Visit any participating Ocean Basket on a Monday. One free kids meal is included per adult meal ordered.

name: Ocean Basket
deal: Epic Catch — sit-down or takeaway meals from R125 to R145. Running 1 May to 30 June.
howToClaim: Order from the Epic Catch menu at any participating Ocean Basket, available for sit-down or takeaway

name: Texan Wing Bar (Montecasino)
deal: All You Can Eat Bottomless Wings — unlimited wings for R199pp
howToClaim: Visit Texan Wing Bar at Montecasino and order the All You Can Eat bottomless wings deal

name: Roco Mamas
deal: Southern Fried Chicken Burger — from R69. Check the promos section of the menu.
howToClaim: Visit any Roco Mamas branch and look for the Southern Fried Chicken Burger under the promos section

name: Spur
deal: Kids Eat Free Sundays — one free kids meal per paying adult with the Spur Family Card
howToClaim: Register a Spur Family Card at your nearest Spur or online. Present card at checkout on Sundays

name: Spur
deal: Classic Monday Burger Special — buy any single original Spur Burger and get another one free
howToClaim: Visit any Spur on a Monday for sit-down dining. The cheaper burger of the two is free automatically

name: Spur
deal: Unreal Breakfast — 2 fried eggs, 2 rashers of grilled bacon, 1 pork sausage, fried tomato, and toast for under R50
howToClaim: Order before 11:00 daily at any Spur branch. Available for sit-down only

name: Panarottis
deal: Big Monday Pizza Special — buy any standard pizza or pasta and get another one free
howToClaim: Dine in at any Panarottis on a Monday. Buy one pizza or pasta and the second one is free automatically

name: Panarottis
deal: Thursday Pizza Night — Eat-As-Much-As-You-Can pizza slices for a fixed price per person
howToClaim: Visit any Panarottis on a Thursday from 16:00. Pay the fixed per-person rate for continuous pizza slice rotations

name: John Dory's
deal: Half-Price Sushi Wednesdays — 50% off all single sushi plates and platters all day
howToClaim: Visit any John Dory's branch on a Wednesday for sit-down dining. Discount applies to all single plates at checkout
